scripts.test: node --test && node --input-type=module -e "const entry = await import('./cumbin.js'); const alias = await import('./index.js'); if (typeof entry.default !== 'function') throw new Error('Missing cumbin.js default export'); if (typeof entry.cumbin !== 'function') throw new Error('Missing cumbin.js named export'); if (alias.default !== entry.default) throw new Error('index.js default does not re-export cumbin.js'); console.log('cumbin exports OK');"
